description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND a Live game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Live game tile with a Lock icon
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team_runs> Runs at <home_team>, <home_team_runs> Runs, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses, <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, LIVE, <half_inning>, Not Entitled, Pitching <pitcher>, <pitcher_innings_pitched> Innings Pitched, <pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Hitting <hitter>, <x_of_y> Hitting Today, <season_average> Season Batting Average, <men_on_base>, <number_of_outs>. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
